[2020-04-12 17:53] zera777 (Zera): Rhino is a perfectly fine attacker
until it runs out of stamina.
In the mid-term, Rhino is quite good.
1. Gain 1 attack
2. Gain 1 attack
3. Gain 2 soak
If Rhino didn't become useless after 3 turns, it would be an *excellent* unit.
The correct time to buy Rhino is 3 turns before you need 2 extra soak.
Or when the opponent gets greedy (e.g. buying double Animus before it's safe to do so).
